8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Google IAM - Implementation
20	
21	# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
22	# Operational Invariants (RBGI is single writer; 409 is fatal)
23	#
24	# - Single admin actor: All RBGI operations are executed by a single admin
25	#   identity. There are no concurrent writers in the same project.
26	# - Pristine-state expectation: RBGI init/creation flows assume the project
27	#   is pristine for the resources they manage. If a resource "already exists"
28	#   (HTTP 409), that's treated as state drift or prior manual activity.
29	# - Policy: All HTTP 409 Conflict responses are fatal (buc_die). We do not
30	#   treat 409 as idempotent success anywhere in RBGI.
31	#   If you see a 409, resolve state drift first (destroy/reset), then rerun.
32	# - Note: 409 has two distinct meanings in RBGI operations:
33	#   (a) Resource creation: "already exists" — state drift or prior manual activity.
34	#   (b) setIamPolicy: "ABORTED" — etag mismatch from concurrent policy change.
35	#   Both are fatal under single-writer invariant. Google-internal auto-provisioning
36	#   can trigger (b) outside our control; the 409 surfaces a real concurrency issue.
37	# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
38	
39	set -euo pipefail
40	
41	# Multiple inclusion detection
42	test -z "${ZRBGI_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgi multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
43	ZRBGI_SOURCED=1
44	
45	######################################################################
46	# Internal Functions (zrbgi_*)
47	
48	zrbgi_kindle() {
49	  test -z "${ZRBGI_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgi already kindled"
50	
51	  # Validate dependencies
52	  buv_dir_exists "${BURD_TEMP_DIR}"
53	
54	  # Ensure dependencies are kindled
55	  zrbgc_sentinel
56	  zrbgu_sentinel
57	
58	  # Module prefix for temp files
59	  readonly ZRBGI_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgi_"
60	  readonly ZRBGI_EMPTY_JSON="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}empty.json"
61	  printf '{}' > "${ZRBGI_EMPTY_JSON}"
62	
63	  readonly ZRBGI_VERSION3_BODY="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}version3_body.json"
64	  printf '%s\n' '{"options":{"requestedPolicyVersion":3}}' > "${ZRBGI_VERSION3_BODY}"
65	
66	  # Infix values for IAM operations
67	  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE="role"
68	  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE_SET="role_set"
69	  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE="repo_role"
70	  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE_SET="repo_role_set"
71	  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_SA_IAM_VERIFY="sa_iamverify"
72	  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM="bucket_iam"
73	  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM_SET="bucket_iam_set"
74	  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_SECRET_IAM="secret_iam"
75	  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_SECRET_IAM_SET="secret_iam_set"
76	
77	  readonly ZRBGI_POSTFIX_JSON="_i_resp.json"
78	
79	  readonly ZRBGI_KINDLED=1
80	}
81	
82	zrbgi_sentinel() {
83	  test "${ZRBGI_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgi not kindled - call zrbgi_kindle first"
84	}
85	
86	# Check if an HTTP response is a 400 with a transient IAM propagation error.
87	# Two known patterns:
88	#   - "does not exist": newly-created SA not yet visible to policy service
89	#   - "is not deleted": recently-deleted SA still referenced in policy bindings
90	# Returns 0 (true) if retryable propagation error, 1 otherwise.
91	zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate() {
92	  local -r z_infix="${1}"
93	  local -r z_code="${2}"
94	
95	  test "${z_code}" = "400" || return 1
96	
97	  local z_err_msg=""
98	  z_err_msg=$(rbgu_error_message_capture "${z_infix}") || z_err_msg=""
99	
100	  case "${z_err_msg}" in
101	    *"does not exist"*) return 0 ;;
102	    *"is not deleted"*) return 0 ;;
103	    *)                  return 1 ;;
104	  esac
105	}
106	
107	######################################################################
108	# External Functions (rbgi_*)
109	
110	# Add a project-scoped IAM role binding with optimistic concurrency and strong read-back.
111	rbgi_add_project_iam_role() {
112	  zrbgi_sentinel
113	
114	  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
115	  local -r z_label="${2:-}"
116	  local -r z_resource="${3:-}"  # resource_base: Base resource URL
117	  local -r z_role="${4:-}"
118	  local -r z_member="${5:-}"
119	  local -r z_parent_infix="${6:-}"
120	
121	  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "Token required"
122	  buc_log_args "Using admin token (value not logged)"
123	
124	  local -r z_resource_path="${z_resource#/}"  # strip leading slash if present
125	  local -r z_base="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/${z_resource_path}"
126	  local -r z_get_url="${z_base}${RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX}"
127	  local -r z_set_url="${z_base}${RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX}"
128	
129	  test -n "${z_resource}" || buc_die "resource required"
130	  test -n "${z_role}"     || buc_die "role required"
131	  test -n "${z_member}"   || buc_die "member required"
132	
133	  buc_log_args "${z_label}: add ${z_member} to ${z_role}"
134	
135	  # Propagation retry: steps 1-3 may fail with HTTP 400 "does not exist"
136	  # when a newly-created SA hasn't propagated to the IAM policy service.
137	  # Exponential backoff: 3s initial, 2x multiplier, 20s cap, 420s deadline.
138	  local z_prop_delay=3
139	  local z_prop_elapsed=0
140	  local z_prop_deadline=420
141	  local z_prop_attempt=0
142	  local z_prop_succeeded=0
143	
144	  while :; do
145	    z_prop_attempt=$((z_prop_attempt + 1))
146	
147	    buc_log_args "1) GET policy (v3) [attempt ${z_prop_attempt}]"
148	    buc_log_args "GET_POLICY_URL_DEBUG z_resource:${z_resource} z_get_url:${z_get_url}"
149	    local z_get_body="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}${z_parent_infix}_get_body.json"
150	    local z_get_infix="${z_parent_infix}-get-${z_prop_elapsed}s"
151	    printf '%s\n' '{"options":{"requestedPolicyVersion":3}}' > "${z_get_body}"
152	    rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_get_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_get_infix}" "${z_get_body}"
153	
154	    local z_get_code=""
155	    z_get_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_get_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from getIamPolicy"
156	
157	    # Check for propagation error on GET
158	    if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_get_infix}" "${z_get_code}"; then
159	      buc_log_args "${z_label}: getIamPolicy returned 400 'does not exist' (propagation delay)"
160	      test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
161	        || buc_die "${z_label}: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s waiting for member visibility"
162	      buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
163	      sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
164	      z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
165	      z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
166	      test "${z_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_prop_delay=20
167	      continue
168	    fi
169	
170	    # Not a propagation error on GET — require success
171	    rbgu_http_require_ok "${z_label} (get policy)" "${z_get_infix}"
172	
173	    buc_log_args 'Extract etag; require non-empty'
174	    local z_etag=""
175	    z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_get_infix}" ".etag") || buc_die "Missing etag"
176	    test -n "${z_etag}" || buc_die "Empty etag"
177	
178	    buc_log_args "Using etag ${z_etag}"
179	
180	    buc_log_args '2) Build new policy JSON in temp (bindings unique; version=3; keep etag)'
181	    local z_new_policy_json=""
182	    z_new_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_get_infix}" "${z_role}" "${z_member}" "${z_etag}") \
183	      || buc_die "Failed to compose policy JSON"
184	
185	    local z_set_body="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}${z_parent_infix}_set_body.json"
186	    printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_new_policy_json}" > "${z_set_body}"
187	
188	    buc_log_args '3) setIamPolicy (fatal on 409 — etag mismatch)'
189	    local z_set_elapsed=0
190	    local z_set_infix=""
191	    local z_set_succeeded=0
192	    while :; do
193	      z_set_infix="${z_parent_infix}-set-${z_prop_elapsed}s-${z_set_elapsed}s"
194	      rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_set_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_body}"
195	
196	      local z_code=""
197	      z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code"
198	
199	      # Check for propagation error on SET — break inner loop to retry outer
200	      if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_set_infix}" "${z_code}"; then
201	        buc_log_args "${z_label}: setIamPolicy returned 400 'does not exist' (propagation delay)"
202	        break
203	      fi
204	
205	      case "${z_code}" in
206	        200)                 z_set_succeeded=1; break ;;
207	        409)                 buc_die "${z_label}: HTTP 409 ABORTED (etag mismatch — concurrent policy change)" ;;
208	        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
209	        *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "${z_label} (set policy)" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
210	      esac
211	
212	      test "${z_set_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "${z_label}: timeout setting policy"
213	      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
214	      z_set_elapsed=$((z_set_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
215	    done
216	
217	    # If setIamPolicy succeeded, break outer propagation loop
218	    test "${z_set_succeeded}" != "1" || { z_prop_succeeded=1; break; }
219	
220	    # setIamPolicy hit propagation error — retry outer loop with fresh getIamPolicy
221	    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
222	      || buc_die "${z_label}: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s waiting for member visibility"
223	    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
224	    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
225	    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
226	    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
227	    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_prop_delay=20
228	  done
229	
230	  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "${z_label}: propagation retry loop exited without success"
231	
232	  buc_log_args '4) Verify membership within bounded wait'
233	  local z_elapsed=0
234	  while :; do
235	    local z_verify_infix="${z_parent_infix}-verify-${z_elapsed}s"
236	    rbgu_http_json_ok "${z_label} (verify)" "${z_token}" "POST" \
237	                       "${z_get_url}" "${z_verify_infix}" "${z_get_body}"
238	
239	    if rbgu_role_member_exists_predicate "${z_verify_infix}" "${z_role}" "${z_member}"; then
240	      buc_log_args "Observed ${z_role} for ${z_member}"
241	
242	      buc_log_args "Post-set etag $(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_verify_infix}" ".etag" 2>/dev/null || echo "")"
243	
244	      return 0
245	    fi
246	
247	    test "${z_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "${z_label}: verify timeout"
248	    sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
249	    z_elapsed=$((z_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
250	  done
251	}
252	
253	rbgi_add_repo_iam_role() {
254	  zrbgi_sentinel
255	
256	  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
257	  local -r z_project_id="${2:-}"
258	  local -r z_account_email="${3:-}"
259	  local -r z_location="${4:-}"
260	  local -r z_repository="${5:-}"
261	  local -r z_role="${6:-}"
262	
263	  test -n "${z_token}"         || buc_die "Token required"
264	  test -n "${z_project_id}"    || buc_die "Project ID required"
265	  test -n "${z_account_email}" || buc_die "Service account email required"
266	  test -n "${z_location}"      || buc_die "Location is required"
267	  test -n "${z_repository}"    || buc_die "Repository is required"
268	  test -n "${z_role}"          || buc_die "Role is required"
269	
270	  buc_log_args "Using admin token (value not logged)"
271	
272	  local -r z_resource="projects/${z_project_id}/locations/${z_location}/repositories/${z_repository}"
273	  local -r z_get_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_resource}:getIamPolicy?options.requestedPolicyVersion=3"
274	  local -r z_set_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_resource}:setIamPolicy"
275	
276	  buc_log_args 'Adding repo-scoped IAM role' \
277	               " ${z_role} to ${z_account_email} on ${z_location}/${z_repository}"
278	
279	  # Propagation retry: get-modify-set may fail with HTTP 400 "does not exist"
280	  # when a newly-created SA hasn't propagated to the IAM policy service.
281	  # Exponential backoff: 3s initial, 2x multiplier, 20s cap, 420s deadline.
282	  local z_prop_delay=3
283	  local z_prop_elapsed=0
284	  local z_prop_deadline=420
285	  local z_prop_attempt=0
286	
287	  local z_prop_succeeded=0
288	
289	  while :; do
290	    z_prop_attempt=$((z_prop_attempt + 1))
291	    local z_get_infix="${ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE}-${z_prop_elapsed}s"
292	
293	    buc_log_args "1) GET repo IAM policy (v3) [attempt ${z_prop_attempt}]"
294	    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_get_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_get_infix}"
295	
296	    local z_get_code
297	    z_get_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_get_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from repo getIamPolicy"
298	
299	    # Check for propagation error on GET
300	    if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_get_infix}" "${z_get_code}"; then
301	      buc_log_args "Repo getIamPolicy returned 400 'does not exist' (propagation delay)"
302	      test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
303	        || buc_die "Repo IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
304	      buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
305	      sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
306	      z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
307	      z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
308	      test "${z_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_prop_delay=20
309	      continue
310	    fi
311	
312	    # Not a propagation error on GET — require success
313	    rbgu_http_require_ok "Get repo IAM policy" "${z_get_infix}"
314	
315	    buc_log_args 'Extract etag; require non-empty'
316	    local z_etag=""
317	    z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_get_infix}" ".etag") || buc_die "Missing repo etag"
318	    test -n "${z_etag}" || buc_die "Empty repo etag"
319	
320	    buc_log_args "Using etag ${z_etag}"
321	
322	    buc_log_args '2) Build new policy JSON (bindings unique; version=3; keep etag)'
323	    local z_updated_policy_json=""
324	    z_updated_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_get_infix}" \
325	      "${z_role}" "serviceAccount:${z_account_email}" "${z_etag}") \
326	      || buc_die "Failed to update policy JSON"
327	
328	    buc_log_args '3) setIamPolicy (fatal on 409 — etag mismatch)'
329	    local z_repo_set_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgi_repo_set_policy_body.json"
330	    printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_updated_policy_json}" > "${z_repo_set_body}" \
331	      || buc_die "Failed to build repo setIamPolicy body"
332	
333	    local z_set_elapsed=0
334	    local z_set_infix=""
335	    local z_set_succeeded=0
336	    while :; do
337	      z_set_infix="${ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE_SET}-${z_prop_elapsed}s-${z_set_elapsed}s"
338	      rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_set_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_set_infix}" "${z_repo_set_body}"
339	
340	      local z_set_code=""
341	      z_set_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from setIamPolicy"
342	
343	      # Check for propagation error on SET — break inner loop to retry outer
344	      if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_code}"; then
345	        buc_log_args "Repo setIamPolicy returned 400 'does not exist' (propagation delay)"
346	        break
347	      fi
348	
349	      case "${z_set_code}" in
350	        200)                 z_set_succeeded=1; break ;;
351	        409)                 buc_die "Repo IAM: HTTP 409 ABORTED (etag mismatch — concurrent policy change)" ;;
352	        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_set_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
353	        *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "Set repo IAM policy" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
354	      esac
355	
356	      test "${z_set_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "Repo IAM: timeout setting policy"
357	      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
358	      z_set_elapsed=$((z_set_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
359	    done
360	
361	    # If setIamPolicy succeeded, break outer propagation loop
362	    test "${z_set_succeeded}" != "1" || { z_prop_succeeded=1; break; }
363	
364	    # setIamPolicy hit propagation error — retry outer loop with fresh getIamPolicy
365	    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
366	      || buc_die "Repo IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
367	    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
368	    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
369	    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
370	    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
371	    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_prop_delay=20
372	  done
373	
374	  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "Repo IAM: propagation retry loop exited without success"
375	
376	  buc_log_args 'Successfully added repo-scoped role' "${z_role}"
377	}
378	
379	rbgi_add_sa_iam_role() {
380	  zrbgi_sentinel
381	
382	  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
383	  local -r z_target_sa_email="${2:-}"
384	  local -r z_member_email="${3:-}"  # email only; function adds serviceAccount: prefix
385	  local -r z_role="${4:-}"
386	
387	  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "Token required"
388	
389	  buc_log_args "Using admin token (value not logged)"
390	  buc_log_args "Granting ${z_role} on SA ${z_target_sa_email} to ${z_member_email}"
391	
392	  # Caller must have already primed Cloud Build if this is the runtime SA.
393	  # We do a hard existence check and crash if not accessible.
394	
395	  buc_log_args 'Verify target SA exists'
396	  local z_target_encoded
397	  z_target_encoded=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_target_sa_email}") \
398	    || buc_die "Failed to encode SA email"
399	
400	  local z_verify_code
401	  rbgu_http_json "GET" \
402	    "${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/-/serviceAccounts/${z_target_encoded}" \
403	                            "${z_token}" "${ZRBGI_INFIX_SA_IAM_VERIFY}"
404	  z_verify_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${ZRBGI_INFIX_SA_IAM_VERIFY}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from SA verify"
405	  test "${z_verify_code}" = "200" || \
406	    buc_die "Target service account not accessible: ${z_target_sa_email} (HTTP ${z_verify_code})"
407	
408	  local -r z_sa_resource="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/-/serviceAccounts/${z_target_encoded}"
409	
410	  # Propagation retry: get-modify-set may fail with HTTP 400 "does not exist"
411	  # when a newly-created SA hasn't propagated to the IAM policy service.
412	  # Exponential backoff: 3s initial, 2x multiplier, 20s cap, 420s deadline.
413	  local z_prop_delay=3
414	  local z_prop_elapsed=0
415	  local z_prop_deadline=420
416	  local z_prop_attempt=0
417	
418	  local z_prop_succeeded=0
419	
420	  while :; do
421	    z_prop_attempt=$((z_prop_attempt + 1))
422	    local z_get_infix="${ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE}-${z_prop_elapsed}s"
423	
424	    buc_log_args "1) GET SA IAM policy (v3) [attempt ${z_prop_attempt}]"
425	    rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_sa_resource}:getIamPolicy" "${z_token}" \
426	      "${z_get_infix}" "${ZRBGI_VERSION3_BODY}"
427	
428	    local z_code
429	    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_get_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from SA getIamPolicy"
430	
431	    # Check for propagation error on GET
432	    if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_get_infix}" "${z_code}"; then
433	      buc_log_args "SA getIamPolicy returned 400 'does not exist' (propagation delay)"
434	      test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
435	        || buc_die "SA IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
436	      buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
437	      sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
438	      z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
439	      z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
440	      test "${z_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_prop_delay=20
441	      continue
442	    fi
443	
444	    # Not a propagation error on GET — require success
445	    rbgu_http_require_ok "Get SA IAM policy" "${z_get_infix}"
446	
447	    buc_log_args 'Extract etag; require non-empty'
448	    local z_etag=""
449	    z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_get_infix}" ".etag") || buc_die "Missing SA etag"
450	    test -n "${z_etag}" || buc_die "Empty SA etag"
451	
452	    buc_log_args "Using etag ${z_etag}"
453	
454	    buc_log_args '2) Build new policy JSON (bindings unique; version=3; keep etag)'
455	    local z_updated_policy_json=""
456	    z_updated_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_get_infix}" \
457	      "${z_role}" "serviceAccount:${z_member_email}" "${z_etag}") \
458	      || buc_die "Failed to update SA IAM policy"
459	
460	    buc_log_args '3) setIamPolicy (fatal on 409 — etag mismatch)'
461	    local z_set_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgi_sa_set_policy_body.json"
462	    printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_updated_policy_json}" > "${z_set_body}" \
463	      || buc_die "Failed to build SA setIamPolicy body"
464	
465	    local z_set_elapsed=0
466	    local z_set_infix=""
467	    local z_set_succeeded=0
468	    while :; do
469	      z_set_infix="${ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE_SET}-${z_prop_elapsed}s-${z_set_elapsed}s"
470	      rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_sa_resource}:setIamPolicy" "${z_token}" \
471	        "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_body}"
472	
473	      local z_set_code=""
474	      z_set_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from setIamPolicy"
475	
476	      # Check for propagation error on SET — break inner loop to retry outer
477	      if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_code}"; then
478	        buc_log_args "SA setIamPolicy returned 400 'does not exist' (propagation delay)"
479	        break
480	      fi
481	
482	      case "${z_set_code}" in
483	        200)                 z_set_succeeded=1; break ;;
484	        409)                 buc_die "SA IAM: HTTP 409 ABORTED (etag mismatch — concurrent policy change)" ;;
485	        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_set_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
486	        *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "Set SA IAM policy" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
487	      esac
488	
489	      test "${z_set_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "SA IAM: timeout setting policy"
490	      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
491	      z_set_elapsed=$((z_set_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
492	    done
493	
494	    # If setIamPolicy succeeded, break outer propagation loop
495	    test "${z_set_succeeded}" != "1" || { z_prop_succeeded=1; break; }
496	
497	    # setIamPolicy hit propagation error — retry outer loop with fresh getIamPolicy
498	    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
499	      || buc_die "SA IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
500	    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
501	    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
502	    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
503	    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
504	    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_prop_delay=20
505	  done
506	
507	  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "SA IAM: propagation retry loop exited without success"
508	
509	  buc_log_args 'Successfully granted SA role' "${z_role}"
510	}
511	
512	rbgi_add_bucket_iam_role() {
513	  zrbgi_sentinel
514	
515	  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
516	  local -r z_bucket_name="${2:-}"
517	  local -r z_account_email="${3:-}"
518	  local -r z_role="${4:-}"
519	
520	  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "Token required"
521	
522	  buc_log_args "Using admin token (value not logged)"
523	  buc_log_args "Adding bucket IAM role ${z_role} to ${z_account_email}"
524	
525	  local -r z_iam_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}/b/${z_bucket_name}/iam"
526	
527	  # Propagation retry: get-modify-set may fail with HTTP 400 "does not exist"
528	  # when a newly-created SA hasn't propagated to the IAM policy service.
529	  # Exponential backoff: 3s initial, 2x multiplier, 20s cap, 420s deadline.
530	  local z_prop_delay=3
531	  local z_prop_elapsed=0
532	  local z_prop_deadline=420
533	  local z_prop_attempt=0
534	
535	  local z_prop_succeeded=0
536	
537	  while :; do
538	    z_prop_attempt=$((z_prop_attempt + 1))
539	    local z_get_infix="${ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM}-${z_prop_elapsed}s"
540	
541	    buc_log_args "1) GET bucket IAM policy (v3) [attempt ${z_prop_attempt}]"
542	    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_iam_url}?optionsRequestedPolicyVersion=3" "${z_token}" "${z_get_infix}"
543	
544	    local z_code
545	    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_get_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from bucket getIamPolicy"
546	
547	    # Check for propagation error on GET
548	    if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_get_infix}" "${z_code}"; then
549	      buc_log_args "Bucket getIamPolicy returned 400 'does not exist' (propagation delay)"
550	      test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
551	        || buc_die "Bucket IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
552	      buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
553	      sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
554	      z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
555	      z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
556	      test "${z_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_prop_delay=20
557	      continue
558	    fi
559	
560	    # Not a propagation error on GET — require success
561	    rbgu_http_require_ok "Get bucket IAM policy" "${z_get_infix}"
562	
563	    buc_log_args 'Extract etag; require non-empty'
564	    local z_etag=""
565	    z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_get_infix}" ".etag") || buc_die "Missing bucket etag"
566	    test -n "${z_etag}" || buc_die "Empty bucket etag"
567	
568	    buc_log_args "Using etag ${z_etag}"
569	
570	    buc_log_args '2) Build new policy JSON (bindings unique; keep etag)'
571	    local z_updated_policy_json=""
572	    z_updated_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_get_infix}" \
573	      "${z_role}" "serviceAccount:${z_account_email}" "${z_etag}") \
574	      || buc_die "Failed to update bucket IAM policy"
575	
576	    buc_log_args '3) setIamPolicy (fatal on 412 — etag mismatch; Storage uses 412 not 409)'
577	    local z_bucket_set_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgi_bucket_set_policy_body.json"
578	    printf '%s\n' "${z_updated_policy_json}" > "${z_bucket_set_body}" \
579	      || buc_die "Failed to write bucket policy body"
580	
581	    local z_set_elapsed=0
582	    local z_set_infix=""
583	    local z_set_succeeded=0
584	    while :; do
585	      z_set_infix="${ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM_SET}-${z_prop_elapsed}s-${z_set_elapsed}s"
586	      rbgu_http_json "PUT" "${z_iam_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_set_infix}" "${z_bucket_set_body}"
587	
588	      local z_set_code=""
589	      z_set_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from setIamPolicy"
590	
591	      # Check for propagation error on SET — break inner loop to retry outer
592	      if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_code}"; then
593	        buc_log_args "Bucket setIamPolicy returned 400 'does not exist' (propagation delay)"
594	        break
595	      fi
596	
597	      case "${z_set_code}" in
598	        200)                 z_set_succeeded=1; break ;;
599	        412)                 buc_die "Bucket IAM: HTTP 412 Precondition Failed (etag mismatch)" ;;
600	        409)                 buc_die "Bucket IAM: HTTP 409 ABORTED (defensive — unexpected for Storage)" ;;
601	        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_set_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
602	        *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "Set bucket IAM policy" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
603	      esac
604	
605	      test "${z_set_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "Bucket IAM: timeout setting policy"
606	      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
607	      z_set_elapsed=$((z_set_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
608	    done
609	
610	    # If setIamPolicy succeeded, break outer propagation loop
611	    test "${z_set_succeeded}" != "1" || { z_prop_succeeded=1; break; }
612	
613	    # setIamPolicy hit propagation error — retry outer loop with fresh getIamPolicy
614	    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
615	      || buc_die "Bucket IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
616	    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
617	    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
618	    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
619	    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
620	    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_prop_delay=20
621	  done
622	
623	  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "Bucket IAM: propagation retry loop exited without success"
624	
625	  buc_log_args "Successfully added bucket role ${z_role}"
626	}

628	# Grant an IAM role binding on a Secret Manager secret with optimistic concurrency and propagation retry.
629	rbgi_grant_secret_iam() {
630	  zrbgi_sentinel
631	
632	  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
633	  local -r z_secret_resource_path="${2:-}"
634	  local -r z_member="${3:-}"
635	  local -r z_role="${4:-}"
636	  local -r z_parent_infix="${5:-}"
637	
638	  test -n "${z_token}"                || buc_die "Token required"
639	  test -n "${z_secret_resource_path}" || buc_die "Secret resource path required"
640	  test -n "${z_member}"               || buc_die "Member required"
641	  test -n "${z_role}"                 || buc_die "Role required"
642	  test -n "${z_parent_infix}"         || buc_die "Parent infix required"
643	
644	  buc_log_args "Using admin token (value not logged)"
645	  buc_log_args "Granting ${z_role} on secret ${z_secret_resource_path} to ${z_member}"
646	
647	  local -r z_get_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER}${RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1}/${z_secret_resource_path}:getIamPolicy?options.requestedPolicyVersion=3"
648	  local -r z_set_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER}${RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1}/${z_secret_resource_path}:setIamPolicy"
649	
650	  # Propagation retry: get-modify-set may fail with HTTP 400 "does not exist"
651	  # when a newly-created SA hasn't propagated to the IAM policy service.
652	  # Exponential backoff: 3s initial, 2x multiplier, 20s cap, 420s deadline.
653	  local z_prop_delay=3
654	  local z_prop_elapsed=0
655	  local z_prop_deadline=420
656	  local z_prop_attempt=0
657	
658	  local z_prop_succeeded=0
659	
660	  while :; do
661	    z_prop_attempt=$((z_prop_attempt + 1))
662	    local z_get_infix="${z_parent_infix}-get-${z_prop_elapsed}s"
663	
664	    buc_log_args "1) GET secret IAM policy (v3) [attempt ${z_prop_attempt}]"
665	    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_get_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_get_infix}"
666	
667	    local z_get_code
668	    z_get_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_get_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from secret getIamPolicy"
669	
670	    # Check for propagation error on GET
671	    if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_get_infix}" "${z_get_code}"; then
672	      buc_log_args "Secret getIamPolicy returned 400 'does not exist' (propagation delay)"
673	      test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
674	        || buc_die "Secret IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
675	      buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
676	      sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
677	      z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
678	      z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
679	      test "${z_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_prop_delay=20
680	      continue
681	    fi
682	
683	    # Not a propagation error on GET — require success
684	    rbgu_http_require_ok "Get secret IAM policy" "${z_get_infix}"
685	
686	    buc_log_args 'Extract etag; require non-empty'
687	    local z_etag=""
688	    z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_get_infix}" ".etag") || buc_die "Missing secret etag"
689	    test -n "${z_etag}" || buc_die "Empty secret etag"
690	
691	    buc_log_args "Using etag ${z_etag}"
692	
693	    buc_log_args '2) Build new policy JSON (bindings unique; version=3; keep etag)'
694	    local z_updated_policy_json=""
695	    z_updated_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_get_infix}" \
696	      "${z_role}" "${z_member}" "${z_etag}") \
697	      || buc_die "Failed to update secret IAM policy"
698	
699	    buc_log_args '3) setIamPolicy (fatal on 409 — etag mismatch)'
700	    local z_set_body="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}${z_parent_infix}_set_body.json"
701	    printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_updated_policy_json}" > "${z_set_body}" \
702	      || buc_die "Failed to build secret setIamPolicy body"
703	
704	    local z_set_elapsed=0
705	    local z_set_infix=""
706	    local z_set_succeeded=0
707	    while :; do
708	      z_set_infix="${z_parent_infix}-set-${z_prop_elapsed}s-${z_set_elapsed}s"
709	      rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_set_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_body}"
710	
711	      local z_set_code=""
712	      z_set_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from setIamPolicy"
713	
714	      # Check for propagation error on SET — break inner loop to retry outer
715	      if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_code}"; then
716	        buc_log_args "Secret setIamPolicy returned 400 'does not exist' (propagation delay)"
717	        break
718	      fi
719	
720	      case "${z_set_code}" in
721	        200)                 z_set_succeeded=1; break ;;
722	        409)                 buc_die "Secret IAM: HTTP 409 ABORTED (etag mismatch — concurrent policy change)" ;;
723	        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_set_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
724	        *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "Set secret IAM policy" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
725	      esac
726	
727	      test "${z_set_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "Secret IAM: timeout setting policy"
728	      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
729	      z_set_elapsed=$((z_set_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
730	    done
731	
732	    # If setIamPolicy succeeded, break outer propagation loop
733	    test "${z_set_succeeded}" != "1" || { z_prop_succeeded=1; break; }
734	
735	    # setIamPolicy hit propagation error — retry outer loop with fresh getIamPolicy
736	    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
737	      || buc_die "Secret IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
738	    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
739	    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
740	    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
741	    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
742	    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_prop_delay=20
743	  done
744	
745	  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "Secret IAM: propagation retry loop exited without success"
746	
747	  buc_log_args "Successfully granted secret role ${z_role}"
748	}

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Google IAM - Implementation

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Operational Invariants (RBGI is single writer; 409 is fatal)
#
# - Single admin actor: All RBGI operations are executed by a single admin
#   identity. There are no concurrent writers in the same project.
# - Pristine-state expectation: RBGI init/creation flows assume the project
#   is pristine for the resources they manage. If a resource "already exists"
#   (HTTP 409), that's treated as state drift or prior manual activity.
# - Policy: All HTTP 409 Conflict responses are fatal (buc_die). We do not
#   treat 409 as idempotent success anywhere in RBGI.
#   If you see a 409, resolve state drift first (destroy/reset), then rerun.
# - Note: 409 has two distinct meanings in RBGI operations:
#   (a) Resource creation: "already exists" — state drift or prior manual activity.
#   (b) setIamPolicy: "ABORTED" — etag mismatch from concurrent policy change.
#   Both are fatal under single-writer invariant. Google-internal auto-provisioning
#   can trigger (b) outside our control; the 409 surfaces a real concurrency issue.
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion detection
test -z "${ZRBGI_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgi multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
ZRBGI_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# Internal Functions (zrbgi_*)

zrbgi_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBGI_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgi already kindled"

  # Validate dependencies
  buv_dir_exists "${BURD_TEMP_DIR}"

  # Ensure dependencies are kindled
  zrbgc_sentinel
  zrbgu_sentinel

  # Module prefix for temp files
  readonly ZRBGI_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgi_"
  readonly ZRBGI_EMPTY_JSON="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}empty.json"
  printf '{}' > "${ZRBGI_EMPTY_JSON}"

  readonly ZRBGI_VERSION3_BODY="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}version3_body.json"
  printf '%s\n' '{"options":{"requestedPolicyVersion":3}}' > "${ZRBGI_VERSION3_BODY}"

  # Infix values for IAM operations
  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE="role"
  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE_SET="role_set"
  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE="repo_role"
  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE_SET="repo_role_set"
  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_SA_IAM_VERIFY="sa_iamverify"
  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM="bucket_iam"
  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM_SET="bucket_iam_set"
  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_SECRET_IAM="secret_iam"
  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_SECRET_IAM_SET="secret_iam_set"

  readonly ZRBGI_POSTFIX_JSON="_i_resp.json"

  readonly ZRBGI_KINDLED=1
}

zrbgi_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBGI_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgi not kindled - call zrbgi_kindle first"
}

# Check if an HTTP response is a 400 with a transient IAM propagation error.
# Two known patterns:
#   - "does not exist": newly-created SA not yet visible to policy service
#   - "is not deleted": recently-deleted SA still referenced in policy bindings
# Returns 0 (true) if retryable propagation error, 1 otherwise.
zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate() {
  local -r z_infix="${1}"
  local -r z_code="${2}"

  test "${z_code}" = "400" || return 1

  local z_err_msg=""
  z_err_msg=$(rbgu_error_message_capture "${z_infix}") || z_err_msg=""

  case "${z_err_msg}" in
    *"does not exist"*) return 0 ;;
    *"is not deleted"*) return 0 ;;
    *)                  return 1 ;;
  esac
}

######################################################################
# External Functions (rbgi_*)

# Add a project-scoped IAM role binding with optimistic concurrency and strong read-back.
rbgi_add_project_iam_role() {
  zrbgi_sentinel

  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
  local -r z_label="${2:-}"
  local -r z_resource="${3:-}"  # resource_base: Base resource URL
  local -r z_role="${4:-}"
  local -r z_member="${5:-}"
  local -r z_parent_infix="${6:-}"

  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "Token required"
  buc_log_args "Using admin token (value not logged)"

  local -r z_resource_path="${z_resource#/}"  # strip leading slash if present
  local -r z_base="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/${z_resource_path}"
  local -r z_get_url="${z_base}${RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX}"
  local -r z_set_url="${z_base}${RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX}"

  test -n "${z_resource}" || buc_die "resource required"
  test -n "${z_role}"     || buc_die "role required"
  test -n "${z_member}"   || buc_die "member required"

  buc_log_args "${z_label}: add ${z_member} to ${z_role}"

  # Propagation retry: steps 1-3 may fail with HTTP 400 "does not exist"
  # when a newly-created SA hasn't propagated to the IAM policy service.
  # Exponential backoff: 3s initial, 2x multiplier, 20s cap, 420s deadline.
  local z_prop_delay=3
  local z_prop_elapsed=0
  local z_prop_deadline=420
  local z_prop_attempt=0
  local z_prop_succeeded=0

  while :; do
    z_prop_attempt=$((z_prop_attempt + 1))

    buc_log_args "1) GET policy (v3) [attempt ${z_prop_attempt}]"
    buc_log_args "GET_POLICY_URL_DEBUG z_resource:${z_resource} z_get_url:${z_get_url}"
    local z_get_body="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}${z_parent_infix}_get_body.json"
    local z_get_infix="${z_parent_infix}-get-${z_prop_elapsed}s"
    printf '%s\n' '{"options":{"requestedPolicyVersion":3}}' > "${z_get_body}"
    rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_get_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_get_infix}" "${z_get_body}"

    local z_get_code=""
    z_get_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_get_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from getIamPolicy"

    # Check for propagation error on GET
    if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_get_infix}" "${z_get_code}"; then
      buc_log_args "${z_label}: getIamPolicy returned 400 'does not exist' (propagation delay)"
      test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
        || buc_die "${z_label}: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s waiting for member visibility"
      buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
      sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
      z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
      z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
      test "${z_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_prop_delay=20
      continue
    fi

    # Not a propagation error on GET — require success
    rbgu_http_require_ok "${z_label} (get policy)" "${z_get_infix}"

    buc_log_args 'Extract etag; require non-empty'
    local z_etag=""
    z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_get_infix}" ".etag") || buc_die "Missing etag"
    test -n "${z_etag}" || buc_die "Empty etag"

    buc_log_args "Using etag ${z_etag}"

    buc_log_args '2) Build new policy JSON in temp (bindings unique; version=3; keep etag)'
    local z_new_policy_json=""
    z_new_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_get_infix}" "${z_role}" "${z_member}" "${z_etag}") \
      || buc_die "Failed to compose policy JSON"

    local z_set_body="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}${z_parent_infix}_set_body.json"
    printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_new_policy_json}" > "${z_set_body}"

    buc_log_args '3) setIamPolicy (fatal on 409 — etag mismatch)'
    local z_set_elapsed=0
    local z_set_infix=""
    local z_set_succeeded=0
    while :; do
      z_set_infix="${z_parent_infix}-set-${z_prop_elapsed}s-${z_set_elapsed}s"
      rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_set_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_body}"

      local z_code=""
      z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code"

      # Check for propagation error on SET — break inner loop to retry outer
      if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_set_infix}" "${z_code}"; then
        buc_log_args "${z_label}: setIamPolicy returned 400 'does not exist' (propagation delay)"
        break
      fi

      case "${z_code}" in
        200)                 z_set_succeeded=1; break ;;
        409)                 buc_die "${z_label}: HTTP 409 ABORTED (etag mismatch — concurrent policy change)" ;;
        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
        *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "${z_label} (set policy)" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
      esac

      test "${z_set_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "${z_label}: timeout setting policy"
      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
      z_set_elapsed=$((z_set_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
    done

    # If setIamPolicy succeeded, break outer propagation loop
    test "${z_set_succeeded}" != "1" || { z_prop_succeeded=1; break; }

    # setIamPolicy hit propagation error — retry outer loop with fresh getIamPolicy
    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
      || buc_die "${z_label}: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s waiting for member visibility"
    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_prop_delay=20
  done

  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "${z_label}: propagation retry loop exited without success"

  buc_log_args '4) Verify membership within bounded wait'
  local z_elapsed=0
  while :; do
    local z_verify_infix="${z_parent_infix}-verify-${z_elapsed}s"
    rbgu_http_json_ok "${z_label} (verify)" "${z_token}" "POST" \
                       "${z_get_url}" "${z_verify_infix}" "${z_get_body}"

    if rbgu_role_member_exists_predicate "${z_verify_infix}" "${z_role}" "${z_member}"; then
      buc_log_args "Observed ${z_role} for ${z_member}"

      buc_log_args "Post-set etag $(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_verify_infix}" ".etag" 2>/dev/null || echo "")"

      return 0
    fi

    test "${z_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "${z_label}: verify timeout"
    sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
    z_elapsed=$((z_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
  done
}

rbgi_add_repo_iam_role() {
  zrbgi_sentinel

  local -r z_token="${1:-}"

  test -n "${z_account_email}" || buc_die "Service account email required"
  test -n "${z_location}"      || buc_die "Location is required"
  test -n "${z_repository}"    || buc_die "Repository is required"
  test -n "${z_role}"          || buc_die "Role is required"

  local -r z_get_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_resource}:getIamPolicy?options.requestedPolicyVersion=3"
  local -r z_set_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_resource}:setIamPolicy"

  buc_log_args 'Adding repo-scoped IAM role' \
               " ${z_role} to ${z_account_email} on ${z_location}/${z_repository}"

  # Propagation retry: get-modify-set may fail with HTTP 400 "does not exist"
  # when a newly-created SA hasn't propagated to the IAM policy service.

  local z_prop_elapsed=0

    buc_log_args "1) GET repo IAM policy (v3) [attempt ${z_prop_attempt}]"

    local z_get_code
    z_get_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_get_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from repo getIamPolicy"

    # Check for propagation error on GET
    if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_get_infix}" "${z_get_code}"; then
      buc_log_args "Repo getIamPolicy returned 400 'does not exist' (propagation delay)"
      test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
        || buc_die "Repo IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
      buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
      sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
      z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
      z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
      test "${z_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_prop_delay=20
      continue
    fi

    # Not a propagation error on GET — require success

    buc_log_args 'Extract etag; require non-empty'

    z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_get_infix}" ".etag") || buc_die "Missing repo etag"
    test -n "${z_etag}" || buc_die "Empty repo etag"

    buc_log_args "Using etag ${z_etag}"

    buc_log_args '2) Build new policy JSON (bindings unique; version=3; keep etag)'
    local z_updated_policy_json=""
    z_updated_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_get_infix}" \
      "${z_role}" "serviceAccount:${z_account_email}" "${z_etag}") \
      || buc_die "Failed to update policy JSON"

    buc_log_args '3) setIamPolicy (fatal on 409 — etag mismatch)'
    local z_repo_set_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgi_repo_set_policy_body.json"
    printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_updated_policy_json}" > "${z_repo_set_body}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to build repo setIamPolicy body"

    local z_set_elapsed=0
    local z_set_infix=""
    local z_set_succeeded=0
    while :; do
      z_set_infix="${ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE_SET}-${z_prop_elapsed}s-${z_set_elapsed}s"
      rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_set_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_set_infix}" "${z_repo_set_body}"

      local z_set_code=""

      # Check for propagation error on SET — break inner loop to retry outer
      if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_code}"; then
        buc_log_args "Repo setIamPolicy returned 400 'does not exist' (propagation delay)"
        break
      fi

      case "${z_set_code}" in
        200)                 z_set_succeeded=1; break ;;
        409)                 buc_die "Repo IAM: HTTP 409 ABORTED (etag mismatch — concurrent policy change)" ;;
        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_set_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
        *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "Set repo IAM policy" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
      esac

      test "${z_set_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "Repo IAM: timeout setting policy"
      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
      z_set_elapsed=$((z_set_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
    done

    # If setIamPolicy succeeded, break outer propagation loop
    test "${z_set_succeeded}" != "1" || { z_prop_succeeded=1; break; }

    # setIamPolicy hit propagation error — retry outer loop with fresh getIamPolicy
    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
      || buc_die "Repo IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_prop_delay=20
  done

  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "Repo IAM: propagation retry loop exited without success"

  buc_log_args 'Successfully added repo-scoped role' "${z_role}"
}

rbgi_add_sa_iam_role() {
  zrbgi_sentinel

  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
  local -r z_target_sa_email="${2:-}"
  local -r z_member_email="${3:-}"  # email only; function adds serviceAccount: prefix
  local -r z_role="${4:-}"

  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "Token required"

  buc_log_args "Using admin token (value not logged)"
  buc_log_args "Granting ${z_role} on SA ${z_target_sa_email} to ${z_member_email}"

  # Caller must have already primed Cloud Build if this is the runtime SA.
  # We do a hard existence check and crash if not accessible.

  buc_log_args 'Verify target SA exists'
  local z_target_encoded
  z_target_encoded=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_target_sa_email}") \
    || buc_die "Failed to encode SA email"

  local z_verify_code
  rbgu_http_json "GET" \
    "${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/-/serviceAccounts/${z_target_encoded}" \
                            "${z_token}" "${ZRBGI_INFIX_SA_IAM_VERIFY}"
  z_verify_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${ZRBGI_INFIX_SA_IAM_VERIFY}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from SA verify"
  test "${z_verify_code}" = "200" || \
    buc_die "Target service account not accessible: ${z_target_sa_email} (HTTP ${z_verify_code})"

  local -r z_sa_resource="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/-/serviceAccounts/${z_target_encoded}"

  # Propagation retry: get-modify-set may fail with HTTP 400 "does not exist"
  # when a newly-created SA hasn't propagated to the IAM policy service.
  # Exponential backoff: 3s initial, 2x multiplier, 20s cap, 420s deadline.
  local z_prop_delay=3
  local z_prop_elapsed=0
  local z_prop_deadline=420
  local z_prop_attempt=0

  local z_prop_succeeded=0

  while :; do
    z_prop_attempt=$((z_prop_attempt + 1))
    local z_get_infix="${ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE}-${z_prop_elapsed}s"

    buc_log_args "1) GET SA IAM policy (v3) [attempt ${z_prop_attempt}]"
    rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_sa_resource}:getIamPolicy" "${z_token}" \
      "${z_get_infix}" "${ZRBGI_VERSION3_BODY}"

    local z_code
    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_get_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from SA getIamPolicy"

    # Check for propagation error on GET
    if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_get_infix}" "${z_code}"; then
      buc_log_args "SA getIamPolicy returned 400 'does not exist' (propagation delay)"
      test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
        || buc_die "SA IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
      buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
      sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
      z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
      z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
      test "${z_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_prop_delay=20
      continue
    fi

    # Not a propagation error on GET — require success
    rbgu_http_require_ok "Get SA IAM policy" "${z_get_infix}"

    buc_log_args 'Extract etag; require non-empty'
    local z_etag=""
    z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_get_infix}" ".etag") || buc_die "Missing SA etag"
    test -n "${z_etag}" || buc_die "Empty SA etag"

    buc_log_args "Using etag ${z_etag}"

    buc_log_args '2) Build new policy JSON (bindings unique; version=3; keep etag)'
    local z_updated_policy_json=""
    z_updated_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_get_infix}" \
      "${z_role}" "serviceAccount:${z_member_email}" "${z_etag}") \
      || buc_die "Failed to update SA IAM policy"

    buc_log_args '3) setIamPolicy (fatal on 409 — etag mismatch)'
    local z_set_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgi_sa_set_policy_body.json"
    printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_updated_policy_json}" > "${z_set_body}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to build SA setIamPolicy body"

    local z_set_elapsed=0
    local z_set_infix=""
    local z_set_succeeded=0
    while :; do
      z_set_infix="${ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE_SET}-${z_prop_elapsed}s-${z_set_elapsed}s"
      rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_sa_resource}:setIamPolicy" "${z_token}" \
        "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_body}"

      local z_set_code=""
      z_set_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from setIamPolicy"

      # Check for propagation error on SET — break inner loop to retry outer
      if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_code}"; then
        buc_log_args "SA setIamPolicy returned 400 'does not exist' (propagation delay)"
        break
      fi

      case "${z_set_code}" in
        200)                 z_set_succeeded=1; break ;;
        409)                 buc_die "SA IAM: HTTP 409 ABORTED (etag mismatch — concurrent policy change)" ;;
        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_set_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
        *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "Set SA IAM policy" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
      esac

      test "${z_set_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "SA IAM: timeout setting policy"
      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
      z_set_elapsed=$((z_set_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
    done

    # If setIamPolicy succeeded, break outer propagation loop
    test "${z_set_succeeded}" != "1" || { z_prop_succeeded=1; break; }

    # setIamPolicy hit propagation error — retry outer loop with fresh getIamPolicy
    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
      || buc_die "SA IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_prop_delay=20
  done

  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "SA IAM: propagation retry loop exited without success"

  buc_log_args 'Successfully granted SA role' "${z_role}"
}

      z_set_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from setIamPolicy"

      # Check for propagation error on SET — break inner loop to retry outer
      if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_code}"; then
        buc_log_args "Bucket setIamPolicy returned 400 'does not exist' (propagation delay)"
        break
      fi

      case "${z_set_code}" in
        200)                 z_set_succeeded=1; break ;;
        412)                 buc_die "Bucket IAM: HTTP 412 Precondition Failed (etag mismatch)" ;;
        409)                 buc_die "Bucket IAM: HTTP 409 ABORTED (defensive — unexpected for Storage)" ;;
        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_set_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
        *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "Set bucket IAM policy" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
      esac

      test "${z_set_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "Bucket IAM: timeout setting policy"
      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
      z_set_elapsed=$((z_set_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
    done

    # If setIamPolicy succeeded, break outer propagation loop
    test "${z_set_succeeded}" != "1" || { z_prop_succeeded=1; break; }

    # setIamPolicy hit propagation error — retry outer loop with fresh getIamPolicy
    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
      || buc_die "Bucket IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_prop_delay=20
  done

  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "Bucket IAM: propagation retry loop exited without success"

  buc_log_args "Successfully added bucket role ${z_role}"
}

# Grant an IAM role binding on a Secret Manager secret with optimistic concurrency and propagation retry.
rbgi_grant_secret_iam() {
  zrbgi_sentinel

  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
  local -r z_secret_resource_path="${2:-}"
  local -r z_member="${3:-}"
  local -r z_role="${4:-}"
  local -r z_parent_infix="${5:-}"

  test -n "${z_token}"                || buc_die "Token required"
  test -n "${z_secret_resource_path}" || buc_die "Secret resource path required"
  test -n "${z_member}"               || buc_die "Member required"
  test -n "${z_role}"                 || buc_die "Role required"
  test -n "${z_parent_infix}"         || buc_die "Parent infix required"

  buc_log_args "Using admin token (value not logged)"
  buc_log_args "Granting ${z_role} on secret ${z_secret_resource_path} to ${z_member}"

  local -r z_get_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER}${RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1}/${z_secret_resource_path}:getIamPolicy?options.requestedPolicyVersion=3"
  local -r z_set_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER}${RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1}/${z_secret_resource_path}:setIamPolicy"

  # Propagation retry: get-modify-set may fail with HTTP 400 "does not exist"
  # when a newly-created SA hasn't propagated to the IAM policy service.
  # Exponential backoff: 3s initial, 2x multiplier, 20s cap, 420s deadline.
  local z_prop_delay=3
  local z_prop_elapsed=0
  local z_prop_deadline=420
  local z_prop_attempt=0

  local z_prop_succeeded=0

  while :; do
    z_prop_attempt=$((z_prop_attempt + 1))
    local z_get_infix="${z_parent_infix}-get-${z_prop_elapsed}s"

    buc_log_args "1) GET secret IAM policy (v3) [attempt ${z_prop_attempt}]"
    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_get_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_get_infix}"

    local z_get_code
    z_get_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_get_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from secret getIamPolicy"

    # Check for propagation error on GET
    if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_get_infix}" "${z_get_code}"; then
      buc_log_args "Secret getIamPolicy returned 400 'does not exist' (propagation delay)"
      test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
        || buc_die "Secret IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
      buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
      sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
      z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
      z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
      test "${z_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_prop_delay=20
      continue
    fi

    # Not a propagation error on GET — require success
    rbgu_http_require_ok "Get secret IAM policy" "${z_get_infix}"

    buc_log_args 'Extract etag; require non-empty'
    local z_etag=""
    z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_get_infix}" ".etag") || buc_die "Missing secret etag"
    test -n "${z_etag}" || buc_die "Empty secret etag"

    buc_log_args "Using etag ${z_etag}"

    buc_log_args '2) Build new policy JSON (bindings unique; version=3; keep etag)'
    local z_updated_policy_json=""
    z_updated_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_get_infix}" \
      "${z_role}" "${z_member}" "${z_etag}") \
      || buc_die "Failed to update secret IAM policy"

    buc_log_args '3) setIamPolicy (fatal on 409 — etag mismatch)'
    local z_set_body="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}${z_parent_infix}_set_body.json"
    printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_updated_policy_json}" > "${z_set_body}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to build secret setIamPolicy body"

    local z_set_elapsed=0
    local z_set_infix=""
    local z_set_succeeded=0
    while :; do
      z_set_infix="${z_parent_infix}-set-${z_prop_elapsed}s-${z_set_elapsed}s"
      rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_set_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_body}"

      local z_set_code=""
      z_set_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from setIamPolicy"

      # Check for propagation error on SET — break inner loop to retry outer
      if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_code}"; then
        buc_log_args "Secret setIamPolicy returned 400 'does not exist' (propagation delay)"
        break
      fi

      case "${z_set_code}" in
        200)                 z_set_succeeded=1; break ;;
        409)                 buc_die "Secret IAM: HTTP 409 ABORTED (etag mismatch — concurrent policy change)" ;;
        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_set_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
        *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "Set secret IAM policy" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
      esac

      test "${z_set_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "Secret IAM: timeout setting policy"
      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
      z_set_elapsed=$((z_set_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
    done

    # If setIamPolicy succeeded, break outer propagation loop
    test "${z_set_succeeded}" != "1" || { z_prop_succeeded=1; break; }

    # setIamPolicy hit propagation error — retry outer loop with fresh getIamPolicy
    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
      || buc_die "Secret IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_prop_delay=20
  done

  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "Secret IAM: propagation retry loop exited without success"

  buc_log_args "Successfully granted secret role ${z_role}"
}

651	  local z_gar_prop_delay=3
652	  local z_gar_prop_elapsed=0

656	  local z_gar_set_infix=""
657	  local z_gar_get_code=""
658	  local z_gar_get_err=""

660	  while :; do

662	    z_gar_get_infix="director_gar_get_iam-${z_gar_prop_elapsed}s"
663	    z_gar_set_infix="director_gar_set_iam-${z_gar_prop_elapsed}s"

666	    z_gar_get_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_gar_get_infix}") || z_gar_get_code=""
667

679	          test "${z_gar_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_gar_prop_delay=20
680	          continue
681	          ;;
682	      esac

701	
702	    local z_gar_set_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_gar_complete_policy_body.json"

705	    rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_gar_set_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_gar_set_infix}" "${z_gar_set_body}"
706	
707	    local z_gar_set_code

709	
710	    # Propagation retry on SET

714	      case "${z_gar_set_err}" in

716	          test "${z_gar_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_gar_prop_deadline}" \
717	            || buc_die "GAR IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_gar_prop_elapsed}s"
718	          buc_log_args "GAR setIamPolicy propagation delay (attempt ${z_gar_prop_attempt}, ${z_gar_prop_elapsed}s)"
719	          sleep "${z_gar_prop_delay}"
720	          z_gar_prop_elapsed=$((z_gar_prop_elapsed + z_gar_prop_delay))
721	          z_gar_prop_delay=$((z_gar_prop_delay * 2))
722	          test "${z_gar_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_gar_prop_delay=20
723	          continue
724	          ;;
725	      esac
726	    fi
727	
728	    rbgu_http_require_ok "Set GAR repo IAM policy (complete)" "${z_gar_set_infix}"
729	    break

733	  buc_info ""

735	  buc_info "operator who consumes this identity. When the invester is also the"
736	  buc_info "consumer, the local role slot is the canonical destination:"
737	  buc_bare "        mv ${RBDC_ASSAY_RBRA_FILE} ${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"

740	# Divest a single role+identity: synthesize email, DELETE (404-tolerant),
741	# opportunistic role-RBRA cleanup only on email match.
742	zrbgg_divest_role() {
743	  zrbgg_sentinel
744	
745	  local -r z_role="$1"
746	  local -r z_identity="$2"
747	  local -r z_role_rbra_file="$3"
748	
749	  local z_account_email="${z_role}-${z_identity}@${RBGD_SA_EMAIL_FULL}"

file.content:
"retriever-analysis"

  buc_info "RBRA file written: ${RBDC_ASSAY_RBRA_FILE}"
  buc_info ""
  buc_info "Move the RBRA file to a safe place — typically delivered to the"
  buc_info "operator who consumes this identity. When the invester is also the"
  buc_info "consumer, the local role slot is the canonical destination:"
  buc_bare "        mv ${RBDC_ASSAY_RBRA_FILE} ${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
}

rbgg_invest_director() {
  zrbgg_sentinel

  local z_identity="${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"

  buc_doc_brief "Invest a Director service account for an identity"
  buc_doc_param "identity" "Identity (required) — composes ${RBCC_role_director}-<identity>"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  test -n "${z_identity}" || buc_die "Identity required"

  local z_account_name="${RBCC_role_director}-${z_identity}"
  local z_account_email="${z_account_name}@${RBGD_SA_EMAIL_FULL}"

  buc_step "Investing Director service account: ${z_account_name}"

  zrbgg_create_service_account_with_key                      \
    "${z_account_name}"                                    \
    "Recipe Bottle Director (${z_identity})"               \
    "Create/destroy container images for ${z_identity}"    \
    "${RBCC_role_director}" > /dev/null || buc_die "Failed to create Director SA"

  buc_step 'Get OAuth token from admin'
  local z_token
  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"

  buc_step 'Adding Cloud Build Editor role (project scope)'
  rbgi_add_project_iam_role                 \
    "${z_token}"                            \
    "Grant Cloud Build Editor"              \
    "${RBGD_PROJECT_RESOURCE}"              \
    "${RBGC_ROLE_CLOUDBUILD_BUILDS_EDITOR}" \
    "serviceAccount:${z_account_email}"     \
    "director-cb"

  rbgi_add_project_iam_role                 \
    "${z_token}"                            \
    "Grant Project Viewer"                  \
    "${RBGD_PROJECT_RESOURCE}"              \
    "roles/viewer"                          \
    "serviceAccount:${z_account_email}"     \
    "director-viewer"

  rbgi_add_project_iam_role                 \
    "${z_token}"                            \
    "Grant Worker Pool User"               \
    "${RBGD_PROJECT_RESOURCE}"              \
    "roles/cloudbuild.workerPoolUser"       \
    "serviceAccount:${z_account_email}"     \
    "director-pool"

  buc_step 'Grant serviceAccountUser on Mason'
  rbgi_add_sa_iam_role "${z_token}" "${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}" "${z_account_email}" "roles/iam.serviceAccountUser"

  buc_step 'Grant Artifact Registry roles (complete expected policy)'
  # Complete policy: Director repoAdmin + Mason writer in one setIamPolicy.
  # Prevents read-modify-write race where stale getIamPolicy omits Mason's binding.
  local -r z_gar_resource="projects/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}/repositories/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
  local -r z_gar_get_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_gar_resource}:getIamPolicy?options.requestedPolicyVersion=3"
  local -r z_gar_set_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_gar_resource}:setIamPolicy"

  local z_gar_prop_delay=3
  local z_gar_prop_elapsed=0
  local -r z_gar_prop_deadline=420
  local z_gar_prop_attempt=0
  local z_gar_get_infix=""
  local z_gar_set_infix=""
  local z_gar_get_code=""
  local z_gar_get_err=""

  while :; do
    z_gar_prop_attempt=$((z_gar_prop_attempt + 1))
    z_gar_get_infix="director_gar_get_iam-${z_gar_prop_elapsed}s"
    z_gar_set_infix="director_gar_set_iam-${z_gar_prop_elapsed}s"

    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_gar_get_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_gar_get_infix}"
    z_gar_get_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_gar_get_infix}") || z_gar_get_code=""

    # Propagation retry: newly-created Director SA may not be visible yet
    if test "${z_gar_get_code}" = "400"; then
      z_gar_get_err=$(rbgu_error_message_capture "${z_gar_get_infix}") || z_gar_get_err=""
      case "${z_gar_get_err}" in
        *"does not exist"*|*"is not deleted"*)
          test "${z_gar_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_gar_prop_deadline}" \
            || buc_die "GAR IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_gar_prop_elapsed}s"
          buc_log_args "GAR getIamPolicy propagation delay (attempt ${z_gar_prop_attempt}, ${z_gar_prop_elapsed}s)"
          sleep "${z_gar_prop_delay}"
          z_gar_prop_elapsed=$((z_gar_prop_elapsed + z_gar_prop_delay))
          z_gar_prop_delay=$((z_gar_prop_delay * 2))
          test "${z_gar_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_gar_prop_delay=20
          continue
          ;;
      esac
    fi

    rbgu_http_require_ok "Get GAR repo IAM policy" "${z_gar_get_infix}"

    # Build complete expected policy: Director repoAdmin + Mason writer
    local z_gar_partial
    z_gar_partial=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_gar_get_infix}" \
      "roles/artifactregistry.repoAdmin" "serviceAccount:${z_account_email}" "") \
      || buc_die "Failed to add Director repoAdmin to GAR IAM policy"

    local z_gar_intermediate="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgu_director_gar_complete_iam_u_resp.json"
    printf '%s\n' "${z_gar_partial}" > "${z_gar_intermediate}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to write intermediate GAR IAM policy"

    local z_gar_complete
    z_gar_complete=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "director_gar_complete_iam" \
      "roles/artifactregistry.writer" "serviceAccount:${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}" "") \
      || buc_die "Failed to add Mason writer to GAR IAM policy"

    local z_gar_set_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_gar_complete_policy_body.json"
    printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_gar_complete}" > "${z_gar_set_body}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to write GAR setIamPolicy body"
    rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_gar_set_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_gar_set_infix}" "${z_gar_set_body}"

    local z_gar_set_code
    z_gar_set_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_gar_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from GAR setIamPolicy"

    # Propagation retry on SET
    if test "${z_gar_set_code}" = "400"; then
      local z_gar_set_err=""
      z_gar_set_err=$(rbgu_error_message_capture "${z_gar_set_infix}") || z_gar_set_err=""
      case "${z_gar_set_err}" in
        *"does not exist"*|*"is not deleted"*)
          test "${z_gar_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_gar_prop_deadline}" \
            || buc_die "GAR IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_gar_prop_elapsed}s"
          buc_log_args "GAR setIamPolicy propagation delay (attempt ${z_gar_prop_attempt}, ${z_gar_prop_elapsed}s)"
          sleep "${z_gar_prop_delay}"
          z_gar_prop_elapsed=$((z_gar_prop_elapsed + z_gar_prop_delay))
          z_gar_prop_delay=$((z_gar_prop_delay * 2))
          test "${z_gar_prop_delay}" -le 20 || z_gar_prop_delay=20
          continue
          ;;
      esac
    fi

    rbgu_http_require_ok "Set GAR repo IAM policy (complete)" "${z_gar_set_infix}"
    break
  done

  buc_info "RBRA file written: ${RBDC_ASSAY_RBRA_FILE}"
  buc_info ""
  buc_info "Move the RBRA file to a safe place — typically delivered to the"
  buc_info "operator who consumes this identity. When the invester is also the"
  buc_info "consumer, the local role slot is the canonical destination:"
  buc_bare "        mv ${RBDC_ASSAY_RBRA_FILE} ${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
}

# Divest a single role+identity: synthesize email, DELETE (404-tolerant),
# opportunistic role-RBRA cleanup only on email match.
zrbgg_divest_role() {
  zrbgg_sentinel

  local -r z_role="$1"
  local -r z_identity="$2"
  local -r z_role_rbra_file="$3"

  local z_account_email="${z_role}-${z_identity}@${RBGD_SA_EMAIL_FULL}"

content.text: Now I have a complete picture. The predicate is called from 10 sites across rbgi_IAM.sh (5 functions × 2 sites each = GET + SET), plus 2 inline matches in rbgg_invest_director (GET + SET). Constants are inlined (3/20/420) at 5 loops in rbgi + 1 loop in rbgg. Let me also check the existing JWT-probe constants and survey the specs.
